subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. He hath created all creation for the recognition of His Self-Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم قد خلق الخلق لعرفان مظهر نفسه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @belief and denial, @purpose; goal of creation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
